overview: Provides for payment of gratuity to eligible employees on termination of employment after completion of qualifying service, subject to the provisions of the Act.

definitions.definition: An employee covered under the Payment of Gratuity Act.
Continuous service as defined under the Act.
The establishment responsible for gratuity compliance.

rules.title: Review Gratuity Applicability
rules.description: Determine whether the establishment is covered under the Payment of Gratuity Act.

rules.title: Maintain Employee Service Records
rules.description: Maintain accurate employee service records to determine gratuity eligibility.

rules.title: Calculate Gratuity
rules.description: Calculate gratuity payable in accordance with statutory provisions.

rules.title: Pay Eligible Gratuity
rules.description: Ensure gratuity is paid to eligible employees within the prescribed timelines.

exceptions.title: Qualifying Service
exceptions.description: Eligibility is subject to qualifying service and other statutory provisions.
